records.chapter: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to thaʿlabah Ibn Maymun
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: And whatever is narrated from Thaʿlabah ibn Maymun, I have narrated it from my father, and from Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan, and from Muhammad ibn Musa ibn Al-Mutawakkil - may Allah (swt) be pleased with them - from Abdullah ibn Jafar Al-Himyari, from Muhammad ibn Al-Husayn ibn Abi Al-Khaṭṭab, from Abdullah ibn Muhammad ibn Al-Hajjal Al-Asadi, from Abu Ishaq Thaʿlabah ibn Maymun. And I have also narrated it from them, from Al-Himyari, from Abdullah ibn Muhammad ibn ʿIsa, from Al-Hajjal, from Thaʿlabah.
records.arabicText: و ما كان فيه عن ثعلبة بن ميمون فقد رويته عن أبي؛ و محمّد بن الحسن؛ و محمّد بن موسى بن المتوكّل- رضي اللّه عنهم- عن عبد اللّه بن جعفر الحميريّ، عن محمّد بن الحسين بن أبي الخطّاب، عن عبد اللّه بن محمّد بن الحجّال الأسديّ، عن أبي إسحاق ثعلبة بن ميمون. و رويته أيضا عنهم، عن الحميريّ، عن عبد اللّه بن محمّد بن عيسى، عن الحجّال، عن ثعلبة.

records.chapter: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Al-Abbas Ibn Amir Al-qaḍbani
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: And whatever is narrated from Al-Abbas ibn Amir Al-Qaḍbani, I have narrated it from my father - may Allah (swt) have mercy on him - from Ali ibn Al-Hasan ibn Ali Al-Kufi, from his father, from Al-Abbas ibn Amir Al-Qaṣbani. And I have also narrated it from Jafar ibn Ali ibn Al-Hasan ibn Ali Al-Kufi, from his grandfather Al-Hasan ibn Ali, from Al-Abbas ibn Amir Al-Qaṣbani.
records.arabicText: و ما كان فيه عن العبّاس بن عامر القضبانيّ فقد رويته عن أبي- رحمه اللّه- عن علي بن الحسن بن عليّ الكوفيّ، عن أبيه، عن العبّاس بن عامر القصبانيّ. و رويته عن جعفر بن عليّ بن الحسن بن عليّ الكوفيّ، عن جدّه الحسن بن عليّ، عن العبّاس ابن عامر القصبانيّ‌.

records.chapter: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Rumi Ibn Zararah
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: And whatever is narrated from Rumi ibn Zararah, I have narrated it from Jafar ibn Muhammad ibn Masrur - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Al-Husayn ibn Muhammad ibn Amir, from his uncle Abdullah ibn Amir, from Muhammad ibn Abi Umayr, from Rumi ibn Zararah.
records.arabicText: و ما كان فيه عن روميّ بن زرارة فقد رويته عن جعفر بن محمّد بن مسرور- رضي اللّه عنه- عن الحسين بن محمّد بن عامر، عن عمّه عبد اللّه بن عامر، عن محمّد بن أبي عمير، عن روميّ بن زرارة.

records.chapter: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Dawud Ibn Ishaq
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: And whatever is narrated from Dawud ibn Ishaq, I have narrated it from Muhammad ibn Ali Majilawayh - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from his uncle Muhammad ibn Abi Al-Qasim, from Ahmad ibn Abi Abdillah, from his father, from Muhammad ibn Sinan, from Dawud ibn Ishaq.
records.arabicText: و ما كان فيه عن داود بن إسحاق فقد رويته عن محمّد بن عليّ ماجيلويه- رضي اللّه عنه- عن عمّه محمّد بن أبي القاسم، عن أحمد بن أبي عبد اللّه، عن أبيه، عن محمّد بن سنان عن داود بن إسحاق‌.

records.chapter: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Bakkar Ibn Kurdum
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: And whatever is narrated from Bakkar ibn Kurdum, I have narrated it from Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan - may Allah (swt) have mercy on him - from Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan Al-Ṣaffar, from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn ʿIsa, from Muhammad ibn Sinan, from Bakkar ibn Kurdum.
records.arabicText: و ما كان فيه عن بكار بن كردم فقد رويته عن محمّد بن الحسن- رحمه اللّه- عن محمّد بن الحسن الصفّار، عن أحمد بن محمّد بن عيسى، عن محمّد بن سنان، عن بكار بن كردم‌.

records.chapter: Clarification of the Transmission Chain for Legal Cases of Amir Al-muʾminin, Peace Be Upon Him
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: And whatever is narrated in various reports regarding the legal cases of Amir Al-Muʾminin, peace be upon him, I have narrated it from my father and from Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan - may Allah (swt) be pleased with them - from Saʿd ibn Abdullah, from Ibrahim ibn Hashim, from Abd Al-Rahman ibn Abi Najran, from Aṣim ibn Humayd, from Muhammad ibn Qays, from Abu Jafar, peace be upon him.
records.arabicText: و ما كان فيه متفرّقا من قضايا أمير المؤمنين عليه السّلام فقد رويته عن أبي؛ و محمّد بن الحسن- رضي اللّه عنهما- عن سعد بن عبد اللّه، عن إبراهيم بن هاشم، عن عبد الرّحمن‌ ابن أبي نجران، عن عاصم بن حميد، عن محمّد بن قيس، عن أبي جعفر عليه السّلام‌.

records.chapter: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Idris Ibn Abdullah Al-Qummi
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: And whatever is narrated from Idris ibn Abdullah Al-Qummi, I have narrated it from my father - may Allah (swt) have mercy on him - from Saʿd ibn Abdullah, from Muhammad ibn Al-Husayn ibn Abi Al-Khaṭṭab, from Jafar ibn Bashir, from Hammad ibn Uthman, from Idris ibn Abdullah ibn Saʿd Al-Ashari Al-Qummi.
records.arabicText: و ما كان فيه عن إدريس بن عبد اللّه القمّيّ فقد رويته عن أبي- رحمه اللّه- عن سعد بن عبد اللّه، عن محمّد بن الحسين بن أبي الخطّاب، عن جعفر بن بشير، عن حمّاد بن عثمان، عن إدريس بن عبد اللّه بن سعد الأشعريّ القمّيّ‌.

records.chapter: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Salamah Ibn Al-khaṭṭab
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: And whatever is narrated from Salamah ibn Al-Khaṭṭab, I have narrated it from my father and from Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan - may Allah (swt) be pleased with them - from Saʿd ibn Abdullah, from Salamah ibn Al-Khaṭṭab Al-Barawastani.
records.arabicText: و ما كان فيه عن سلمة بن الخطّاب فقد رويته عن أبي؛ و محمّد بن الحسن- رضي اللّه عنهما- عن سعد بن عبد اللّه، عن سلمة بن الخطّاب البراوستانيّ‌.

records.chapter: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Idris Ibn Zayd
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: And whatever is narrated from Idris ibn Zayd, I have narrated it from Ahmad ibn Ali ibn Ziyad - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Ali ibn Ibrahim, from his father, from Idris ibn Zayd Al-Qummi.
records.arabicText: و ما كان فيه عن إدريس بن زيد فقد رويته عن أحمد بن عليّ بن زياد- رضي اللّه عنه- عن عليّ بن إبراهيم، عن أبيه، عن إدريس بن زيد القمّيّ‌.

records.chapter: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Muhammad Ibn Sahl
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: And whatever is narrated from Muhammad ibn Sahl, I have narrated it from my father and from Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan - may Allah (swt) be pleased with them - from Saʿd ibn Abdullah, from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn ʿIsa, from Muhammad ibn Sahl ibn Al-Yasaʿ Al-Ashari.
records.arabicText: و ما كان فيه عن محمّد بن سهل فقد رويته عن أبي؛ و محمّد بن الحسن- رضي اللّه عنهما- عن سعد بن عبد اللّه، عن أحمد بن محمّد بن عيسى، عن محمّد بن سهل بن اليسع الأشعريّ‌.

records.chapter: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Jafar Ibn Uthman
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: And whatever is narrated from Jafar ibn Uthman, I have narrated it from my father - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Ali ibn Musa Al-Kamandani, from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn ʿIsa, from Al-Husayn ibn Saʿid, from Muhammad ibn Abi Umayr, from Abu Jafar Al-Shami, from Jafar ibn Uthman.
records.arabicText: و ما كان فيه عن جعفر بن عثمان فقد رويته عن أبي- رضي اللّه عنه- عن عليّ بن موسى الكمندانيّ، عن أحمد بن محمّد بن عيسى، عن الحسين بن سعيد، عن محمّد بن‌ أبي عمير، عن أبي جعفر الشاميّ، عن جعفر بن عثمان‌.

records.chapter: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Uthman Ibn Ziyad
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: And whatever is narrated from Uthman ibn Ziyad, I have narrated it from Abd Al-Wahid ibn Muhammad ibn Abdus Al-Aṭṭar Al-Nisaburi, from Ali ibn Muhammad ibn Qutaybah, from Hamdan ibn Sulayman, from Muhammad ibn Al-Husayn, from Uthman ibn ʿIsa, from Abd Al-Ṣamad ibn Bashir, from Uthman ibn Ziyad.
records.arabicText: و ما كان فيه عن عثمان بن زياد فقد رويته عن عبد الواحد بن محمّد بن عبدوس العطّار النيسابوريّ، عن عليّ بن محمّد بن قتيبة، عن حمدان بن سليمان، عن محمّد بن الحسين، عن عثمان بن عيسى، عن عبد الصمد بن بشير، عن عثمان بن زياد.

records.chapter: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Umayyah Ibn Amr, From Al-Shuayri
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: And whatever is narrated from Umayyah ibn Amr, from Al-Shuayri, I have narrated it from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn Yahya Al-Aṭṭar - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Saʿd ibn Abdullah, from Ahmad ibn Hilal, from Umayyah ibn Amr, from Ismaʿil ibn Muslim Al-Shuayri.
records.arabicText: و ما كان فيه عن اميّة بن عمرو، عن الشعيريّ فقد رويته عن أحمد بن محمّد بن يحيى العطّار- رضي اللّه عنه- عن سعد بن عبد اللّه، عن أحمد بن هلال، عن اميّة بن عمرو، عن إسماعيل بن مسلم الشعيريّ‌.

records.chapter: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Minhal Al-qaṣṣab
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: And whatever is narrated from Minhal Al-Qaṣṣab, I have narrated it from my father - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Muhammad ibn Yahya Al-Aṭṭar, from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn ʿIsa, from Al-Hasan ibn Mahbub, from Minhal Al-Qaṣṣab.
records.arabicText: و ما كان فيه عن منهال القصّاب فقد رويته عن أبي- رضي اللّه عنه- عن محمّد بن يحيى العطّار، عن أحمد بن محمّد بن عيسى، عن الحسن بن محبوب، عن منهال القصّاب‌.

records.chapter: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Masadah Ibn Ziyad
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: And whatever is narrated from Masadah ibn Ziyad, I have narrated it from my father and from Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan - may Allah (swt) be pleased with them - from Saʿd ibn Abdullah and Al-Himyari together, from Harun ibn Muslim, from Masadah ibn Ziyad.
records.arabicText: و ما كان فيه عن مسعدة بن زياد فقد رويته عن أبي؛ و محمّد بن الحسن- رضي اللّه عنهما- عن سعد بن عبد اللّه؛ و الحميريّ جميعا عن هارون بن مسلم، عن مسعدة ابن زياد.

records.chapter: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Dawud Ibn Abi Yazid
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: And whatever is narrated from Dawud ibn Abi Yazid, I have narrated it from my father - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Saʿd ibn Abdullah, from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn ʿIsa, from Al-Abbas ibn Maʿruf, from Abu Muhammad Al-Hajjal, from Dawud ibn Abi Yazid.
records.arabicText: و ما كان فيه عن داود بن أبي يزيد فقد رويته عن أبي- رضي اللّه عنه- عن سعد بن عبد اللّه، عن أحمد بن محمّد بن عيسى، عن العبّاس بن معروف، عن أبي محمّد الحجّال، عن داود بن أبي يزيد.

records.chapter: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Thuwair Ibn Abi Fakhtah
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: And whatever is narrated from Thuwair ibn Abi Fakhtah, I have narrated it from my father and from Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan - may Allah (swt) be pleased with them - from Saʿd ibn Abdullah, from Al-Haytham ibn Abi Masruq Al-Nahdi, from Al-Hasan ibn Mahbub, from Malik ibn Aṭiyyah, from Thuwair ibn Abi Fakhtah, whose father's name was Saʿid ibn ʿIlaqah.
records.arabicText: و ما كان فيه عن ثوير بن أبي فاختة فقد رويته عن أبي؛ و محمّد بن الحسن- رضي اللّه عنهما- عن سعد بن عبد اللّه، عن الهيثم بن أبي مسروق النهديّ، عن الحسن بن محبوب، عن مالك بن عطيّة، عن ثوير بن أبي فاختة، و اسم أبي فاختة سعيد بن علاقة.

records.chapter: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to ʿisa Ibn aʿyan
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: And whatever is narrated from ʿIsa ibn Aʿyan, I have narrated it from my father - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Muhammad ibn Ahmad ibn Ali ibn Al-Ṣalt, from Abu Ṭalib Abdullah ibn Al-Ṣalt, from Abdullah ibn Al-Mughirah, from ʿIsa ibn Aʿyan.
records.arabicText: و ما كان فيه عن عيسى بن أعين فقد رويته عن أبي- رضي اللّه عنه- عن محمّد بن‌ أحمد بن عليّ بن الصلت، عن أبي طالب عبد اللّه بن الصلت، عن عبد اللّه بن المغيرة، عن عيسى بن أعين‌.

records.chapter: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Muhammad Ibn Hassan
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: And whatever is narrated from Muhammad ibn Hassan, I have narrated it from my father, and from Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan, and from Al-Husayn ibn Ahmad ibn Idris - may Allah (swt) be pleased with them - from Ahmad ibn Idris, from Muhammad ibn Hassan.
records.arabicText: و ما كان فيه عن محمّد بن حسّان فقد رويته عن أبي؛ و محمّد بن الحسن؛ و الحسين بن أحمد بن إدريس- رضي اللّه عنهم- عن أحمد بن إدريس، عن محمّد بن حسّان‌.

records.chapter: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Ahmad Ibn Muhammad Ibn ʿisa Al-Ashari
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: And whatever is narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn ʿIsa Al-Ashari - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - I have narrated it from my father and from Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan - may Allah (swt) be pleased with them - from Saʿd ibn Abdullah and Abdullah ibn Jafar Al-Himyari together, from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn ʿIsa Al-Ashari.
records.arabicText: و ما كان فيه عن أحمد بن محمّد بن عيسى الأشعريّ- رضي اللّه عنه- فقد رويته عن أبي؛ و محمّد بن الحسن- رضي اللّه عنهما- عن سعد بن عبد اللّه؛ و عبد اللّه بن جعفر الحميريّ جميعا عن أحمد بن محمّد بن عيسى الأشعريّ‌.

records.chapter: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Umar Ibn Abi shuʿbah
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: And whatever is narrated from Umar ibn Abi Shuʿbah, I have narrated it from Muhammad ibn Ali Majilawayh - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Muhammad ibn Yahya, from Muhammad ibn Al-Husayn ibn Abi Al-Khaṭṭab, from Jafar ibn Bashir, from Hammad ibn Uthman, from Umar ibn Abi Shuʿbah Al-Halabi.
records.arabicText: و ما كان فيه عن عمر بن أبي شعبة فقد رويته عن محمّد بن عليّ ماجيلويه- رضي اللّه عنه- عن محمّد بن يحيى، عن محمّد بن الحسين بن أبي الخطّاب، عن جعفر بن بشير، عن حمّاد بن عثمان، عن عمر بن أبي شعبة الحلبيّ‌.

records.chapter: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Umar Ibn Qays Al-maṣir
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: And whatever is narrated from Umar ibn Qays Al-Maṣir, I have narrated it from my father and from Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan - may Allah (swt) have mercy on them - from Saʿd ibn Abdullah, from Ahmad ibn Abi Abdillah Al-Barqi, from his father, from Muhammad ibn Sinan and others, from Umar ibn Qays Al-Maṣir.
records.arabicText: و ما كان فيه عن عمر بن قيس الماصر فقد رويته عن أبي؛ و محمّد بن الحسن- رحمهما اللّه- عن سعد بن عبد اللّه، عن أحمد بن أبي عبد اللّه البرقيّ، عن أبيه، عن محمّد بن سنان و غيره، عن عمر بن قيس الماصر.

records.chapter: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Abu saʿid Al-Khudri Regarding the Will of the Prophet, Peace and Blessings Be Upon Him and His Family, to Ali, Peace Be Upon Him
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
And whatever is narrated from Abu Saʿid Al-Khudri regarding the will of the Prophet, peace and blessings be upon him and his family, to Ali, peace be upon him, which begins with the statement: "O' Ali, when the bride enters your house," I have narrated it from Muhammad ibn Ibrahim ibn Ishaq Al-Ṭalqani - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Abu Saʿid Al-Hasan ibn Ali Al-Adawi, from Yusuf ibn Yahya Al-Aṣbahani Abu Yaʿqub, from Abu Ali Ismaʿil ibn Hatim.
Abu Jafar Ahmad ibn Ṣalih ibn Saʿid Al-Makki narrated to us, who said: Umar ibn Hafṣ narrated to us, from Ishaq ibn Najih, from Huṣayf, from Mujahid, from Abu Saʿid Al-Khudri, who said: The Messenger of Allah (swt), peace and blessings be upon him and his family, entrusted his will to Ali ibn Abi Ṭalib, peace be upon him, and said: "O' Ali, when the bride enters your house," and he narrated the hadith in its entirety as recorded in this book.
records.arabicText:
و ما كان فيه عن أبي سعيد الخدريّ من وصيّة النبيّ صلّى اللّه عليه و آله لعليّ عليه السّلام- التي أوّلها "يا عليّ إذا دخلت العروس بيتك"- فقد رويته عن محمّد بن إبراهيم بن إسحاق الطالقانيّ- رضي اللّه عنه- عن أبي سعيد الحسن بن عليّ العدويّ، عن يوسف بن يحيى الأصبهانيّ أبي يعقوب، عن أبي عليّ إسماعيل بن حاتم قال:
حدّثنا أبو جعفر أحمد بن صالح بن سعيد المكّيّ قال: حدّثنا عمر [و] بن حفص، عن إسحاق بن نجيح، عن حصيف، عن مجاهد، عن أبي سعيد الخدريّ قال: أوصى رسول- اللّه صلّى اللّه عليه و آله إلى عليّ بن أبي طالب عليه السّلام فقال: يا عليّ إذا دخلت العروس بيتك- و ذكر الحديث بطوله على ما في هذا الكتاب.
records.thaqalaynSanad: And whatever is narrated from Abu Saʿid Al-Khudri regarding the will of the Prophet, peace and blessings be upon him and his family, to Ali, peace be upon him, which begins with the statement:
records.thaqalaynMatn:
"O' Ali, when the bride enters your house," I have narrated it from Muhammad ibn Ibrahim ibn Ishaq Al-Ṭalqani - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Abu Saʿid Al-Hasan ibn Ali Al-Adawi, from Yusuf ibn Yahya Al-Aṣbahani Abu Yaʿqub, from Abu Ali Ismaʿil ibn Hatim.
Abu Jafar Ahmad ibn Ṣalih ibn Saʿid Al-Makki narrated to us, who said: Umar ibn Hafṣ narrated to us, from Ishaq ibn Najih, from Huṣayf, from Mujahid, from Abu Saʿid Al-Khudri, who said: The Messenger of Allah (swt), peace and blessings be upon him and his family, entrusted his will to Ali ibn Abi Ṭalib, peace be upon him, and said: "O' Ali, when the bride enters your house," and he narrated the hadith in its entirety as recorded in this book.

records.chapter: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Ali Ibn Hassan
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: And whatever is narrated from Ali ibn Hassan, I have narrated it from Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan Al-Ṣaffar, from Ali ibn Hassan Al-Wasiṭi. And I have also narrated it from my father - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Saʿd ibn Abdullah, from Al-Hasan ibn Musa Al-Khashshab, from Ali ibn Hassan Al-Wasiṭi.
records.arabicText: و ما كان فيه عن عليّ بن حسّان فقد رويته عن محمّد بن الحسن- رضي اللّه عنه- عن محمّد بن الحسن الصفّار، عن عليّ بن حسّان الواسطيّ؛ و رويته عن أبي- رضي اللّه عنه- عن سعد بن عبد اللّه، عن الحسن بن موسى الخشّاب، عن عليّ بن حسان الواسطيّ‌.

records.chapter: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to ismaʿil Ibn Mihran Regarding the Words of faṭimah, Peace Be Upon Her
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: And whatever is narrated from Ismaʿil ibn Mihran regarding the words of Faṭimah, peace be upon her, I have narrated it from Muhammad ibn Musa ibn Al-Mutawakkil - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Ali ibn Al-Husayn Al-Saʿdaʾbadi, from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn Khalid Al-Barqi, from his father, from Ismaʿil ibn Mihran, from Ahmad ibn Muhammad Al-Khuzaʿi, from Muhammad ibn Jabir, from Abbad Al-Amiri, from Zaynab, the daughter of Amir Al-Muʾminin, peace be upon them, from Faṭimah, peace be upon her.
records.arabicText: و ما كان فيه عن إسماعيل بن مهران من كلام فاطمة عليها السّلام فقد رويته عن محمّد بن موسى بن المتوكّل- رضي اللّه عنه- عن عليّ بن الحسين السعدآباديّ، عن أحمد بن محمّد بن خالد البرقيّ، عن أبيه، عن إسماعيل بن مهران، عن أحمد بن محمّد الخزاعيّ، عن محمّد بن جابر، عن عبّاد العامريّ، عن زينب بنت أمير المؤمنين عليهما السّلام، عن‌ فاطمة عليها السّلام‌.
